mapper.sql: id, create_time, update_time, seat, content, type
mapper.insert: insert into advertisement (id, create_time, update_time, seat, type, content) values (#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{seat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR})

insert into advertisement
id,
create_time,
update_time,
seat,
type,
content,
#{id,jdbcType=BIGINT},
#{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
#{seat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
#{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
#{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
mapper.update:
update advertisement
create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},
seat = #{seat,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
type = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT},
content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR},
where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}

update advertisement set create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, seat = #{seat,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, type = #{type,jdbcType=TINYINT}, content = #{content,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
